description: Get dressed in these thongs from catwalk for a feminine look. The woven straps lend a dose of chic to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Colourful leather uppers in a thong style for extra comfort Leather backing on the straps for added comfort Midsole Wooden footbed for durability and style Outsole TPU outsole in a flexible design for greater flexibility of the feet Grainy pattern on the forefoot and the heel for extra grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
